name: stablecoin-yield-radar
description: Real-time stablecoin yield APY rankings from Barker's stablecoin yield index. Returns ranked APY, TVL, protocol, chain, and asset for USDT, USDC, DAI, USDe, and more. Also for treasury and idle-balance yield — payment companies, wallets, on/off-ramps, and funds parking idle stablecoins, float, or treasury.
